title: The Skull Dome Battle Spreads
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Tama, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Black Maria as Battles spread through the Skull Dome while Tama, Chopper, Marco, and the alliance shift the momentum.
scene: Across the Skull Dome, the alliance fights to survive while Tama, Chopper, Marco, and the Straw Hats change the flow of battle.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: What the hell is going on!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Why would they double- cross us?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's like you want to get your heads caved in.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: These pests must be using some weird ability!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: that won't keep her down for long...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The thunderbolt would have to be waaaay bigger!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Damn it that hurts! I'm gonna get that woman. How dare she!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What the hell is going on?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm your opponent! Keep your eyes on me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Castle interior, third floor great banquet hall

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: You're quite strong! What a shame.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You can put these men through all that,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...but you can't lay a finger on a woman. You never stood a chance against us.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Your life is now in my hands...()

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 44 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
